synthesis.honest_caveat: ORDER-OF-MAGNITUDE estimate, not a quote: (1) N_train_tokens=4e+08 is derived from the paper's entry counts (532K entries x ~752 tok/entry), not a measured token count -- the paper gives entries, not tokens; (2) epochs are NOT in the paper (default 10 = codebase convention); (3) MFU 0.35 and 125 TFLOP/s are nominal A10G assumptions; (4) the target's response-GENERATION pass (~20.3 GPU-hr if run separately) is FUSED into capture for a self-generated corpus and excluded from the headline; (5) DP wall-clock assumes ideal 8x scaling (ignores comm/imbalance). Feasibility verdict is robust: even at 8e8 tokens x 20 epochs the total stays a small multiple of budget (sensitivity grid logged).
synthesis.verdict: EAGLE-3 drafter BUILD-COST (A10G, sm_86, 125 TFLOP/s x MFU 0.35 = 43.8 TFLOP/s eff): capture-pass 20.3 GPU-hr (target fwd 2*4.0B*4e+08N) + drafter-train 87.1 GPU-hr (core 19.0 + frozen 262k-vocab lm_head GEMM 68.2) = TOTAL 107.5 A10G-GPU-hr -> 13.4 h wall-clock on 8x A10G (DP). vs <=200 GPU-hr lane budget: GO-ON-COST (headroom 92.5 GPU-hr). The lm_head GEMM dominates the draft net 3.59x/token and inflates the total 2.74x over the PR-literal core-only accounting (flagged >2x). The paper reports NO train cost, so this bottom-up estimate IS the anchor. 0 TPS added; BASELINE 481.53 untouched; analysis-only; NOT a launch.
synthesis.handoff: the human EAGLE-3 GO/NO-GO now has its SPEND axis: ~107 A10G-GPU-hr (~13.4 h on 8x A10G) to build the drafter at N=4e+08 tokens x 10 epochs, MFU 0.35 -- GO under the <=200 GPU-hr lane budget. Dominant term is the 262k-vocab lm_head GEMM (68.2 GPU-hr, 78% of drafter train), not the 124.5M draft net; epochs/tokens are the live knobs (sensitivity logged). Pairs with wirbel #290 (acceptance), kanna #294 (Phase-1), ubel #299 (VRAM), lawine #300 (private bar): cost is no longer the missing input.
